analysis: The translation is excellent, maintaining the playful yet technical tone of the original. It correctly handles complex MDX structures and preserves all code-related logic. The Russian terminology for modern CSS features (nesting, clamp, variables) is accurate and natural.
strengths: Perfect preservation of MDX component structure and slot names.
Natural localization of idiomatic expressions like 'How difficult can it be, eh?' to 'Ну насколько это может быть сложно, а?'.
Consistent and correct use of technical terms (вычисленная ширина, нативная вложенность, резервные значения).

issues.note: One minor comment inside a code block remains in English, though it doesn't affect the quiz logic.
